text: Project setup screen navigation list overflows

proposedTasks.title: Fix navigation list overflow on project setup screen
proposedTasks.description: The navigation step list in the Project Setup Wizard overflows its container, likely when the viewport is small or the list items are long. Add proper overflow handling (e.g., overflow-y: auto, max-height constraint, or text truncation) to the setup wizard's navigation/step indicator so it remains fully visible and scrollable within its container. Acceptance criteria: (1) Navigation list does not overflow its parent container at any supported viewport size. (2) If content exceeds available space, the list scrolls internally or truncates gracefully. (3) All wizard steps remain accessible and clickable.

taskTitles: Fix navigation list overflow on project setup screen
